full_text:
Yang Feng 楊奉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Feng (楊奉)was born in Hedong?. Betrayed Li Jue to help Emperor Xian. Served Yuan Shu then Lü Bu. Killed by Liu Bei. Yang Feng was affiliated with Li Jue, the Han Dynasty, Yuan Shu, and Lu Bu. Yang Feng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
